narrative:
Cols 69-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 778 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
